description_long: This is a tall, narrow filing cabinet with a weathered, gray wood exterior and a set of four black drawers on the front. The drawers each feature a horizontal metallic handle and a small circular lock, with label holders above the handles for easy identification. The sides and back of the cabinet are constructed from the same rustic wood, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The legs are long and straight, elevating the cabinet off the ground and providing a stable base. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and durability, making it suitable for storing documents or small items. The combination of wood and metal elements gives it a modern yet rugged look, ideal for urban or industrial environments.
description: A tall, narrow filing cabinet with a weathered wood frame and four black drawers featuring metallic handles, locks, and label holders. Its industrial design combines wood and metal for a sturdy, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing four black drawers with metallic handles, locks, and label holders set in a weathered wood frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the tall, narrow, weathered wood panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid black panel framed by weathered wood, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the weathered wood panel with no features.
